scripts.dev: concurrently --names safe,danger,family-friendly,general,english,blockchain "pnpm run dev:safe" "pnpm run dev:danger" "pnpm run dev:family-friendly" "pnpm run dev:general" "pnpm run dev:english" "pnpm run dev:blockchain"
scripts.dev:safe: env INDEXER_PORT=3008 MONGODB_DATABASE=openseo_safe INDEXER_COLLECTION=proofs INDEXER_LIST_FILE=./src/lists/list-safe.example.txt DA_WS_URL=wss://openseo-da.openseo.workers.dev/ws DA_HTTP_URL=https://openseo-da.openseo.workers.dev tsx src/indexer-route.ts
scripts.dev:danger: env INDEXER_PORT=3012 MONGODB_DATABASE=openseo_dark INDEXER_COLLECTION=proofs INDEXER_LIST_FILE=./src/lists/list-dark.example.txt DA_WS_URL=wss://openseo-da.openseo.workers.dev/ws DA_HTTP_URL=https://openseo-da.openseo.workers.dev tsx src/indexer-route.ts
scripts.dev:family-friendly: env INDEXER_PORT=3032 MONGODB_DATABASE=openseo_family-friendly INDEXER_COLLECTION=proofs INDEXER_LIST_FILE=./src/lists/list-family-friendly.example.txt DA_WS_URL=wss://openseo-da.openseo.workers.dev/ws DA_HTTP_URL=https://openseo-da.openseo.workers.dev tsx src/indexer-route.ts
